title: Sym's Armored Industries
description: An Iron Man Mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 using Palladium as its Core Mod. Experience the Highest Quality Iron Man Content ever made on Minecraft with content spanning from the MCU to Armored Adventures
body:
![Poster of Sym's Armored Industries that showcases the many Iron Man Armors featured in the Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f880e101d3e0adc329abf5db741ba4c5346e95.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NtRLGs-kd3c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Sym's Armored Industries is a Mod Developed using the Palladium Core
\
**A ComicCraft Mod**

This Mod offers the Highest Quality Iron Man Armors you'll ever find in Minecraft. From Tony Stark's more Mechanical and Heavy Armors like Mark 3 to the more Sleek Armor designs like Mark 42, we have it all! 

The aesthetics of the Mod involve a combination of the intricate Iron Man designs with Minecraft to stay _mostly_ vanilla in its designs but with the added sense of the Armors having popped straight out of the MCU and into Minecraft

_Notice: It is **Highly Recommended to Play this Mod on Fabric** as that's the platform it was tested on the most. Some Features may currently be unstable on Forge so please report any Bugs in the appropriate Forum on our Discord!_

[ComicCraft Discord](https://discord.com/invite/comiccraft 'ComicCraft Discord')

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5777b5062d180ed22c4d17f9e2bd60f541865550.png)

# Features:
- Create your very own **Stark Computer** and begin Crafting some of Tony Stark's most Intricate Iron Man Armors
  - Custom _GUI System_ never seen before in any Mod using Palladium
- An **_Aresenal of Weapons_** and **_Abilities_** packed into each Armor for Players to use. Here at Sym's Armored Industries, we don't only offer simple repulsors and unibeams, we have forearm missiles, shoulder rockets, lasers and more... Experience the Iron Man Armor the way it was designed to be experienced
- Iron Man Inspired Structures throughout the Minecraft World:
  - **Mini Arc Reactors**: Find the Arc Reactor Core needed to build your own Arc Reactor that powers your Armors
  - **Stark Outposts**: Search these for Stark Access Keys, various ores and other goodies
  - **Makluan Temples**: Search these to find very rare Makluan Rings (there are a total of ten)
- The **Highest Quality Suit-Up Animations** for every Iron Man Suit that has had a Suit-Up. Our Animators spent a great deal of time recreating those Suit-Ups in Minecraft to be as 1:1 as possible and managed to achieve just that!
  - **Mark 5**: Pick up that **_Suitcase_** and recreate the most Iconic Suit-Up in MCU History
  - **Mark 7**: Faithful Recreation of the _In-Air_ Suit-Up seen with the Mark 7 **_Pod_** in The Avengers as well as a custom _On-Ground_ version for gameplay purposes
  - **Mark 42**: The Prodigal Son... Everyone is familiar with this Suit-Up and now you can experience it in Minecraft better than ever with the highest quality and most realistic animation that you wouldn't believe without first seeing it yourself
  - _Both Mark 7 and Mark 42 have a Unique Suit-Off Animation. It's not just the Suit-Up Animation played in reverse_
- Integration with other mods like Ad Astra to enhance the gameplay experience
- **Iron Man Skill Point System** used to obtain Points for each Iron Man Armor and unlock Abilities

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5777b5062d180ed22c4d17f9e2bd60f541865550.png)

## Mod Requirements:
[Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium), [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs), [Rhino](https://modrinth.com/mod/rhino), [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api), [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui), [Curios API (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)/[Trinkets (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)

Please use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to view all _Recipes_ in the Mod

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5777b5062d180ed22c4d17f9e2bd60f541865550.png)

## Official Server
- Server IP: **_Palladium.ComicCraft.net_**
- [Modrinth ModPack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/palladium-superheroes-server)
- [CurseForge ModPack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/palladium-superheroes-server)
- _Notice: This is only the Official Server for ComicCraft Mods made using Palladium (specifically, Sym's Armored Industries and Symformers). This is not the Official Server for the Palladium Mod in General!_

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5777b5062d180ed22c4d17f9e2bd60f541865550.png)

## FAQ

<details>
<summary>Click to view FAQ</summary>
When will Mark X Iron Man Armor be added?

- Here at ComicCraft and Sym's Armored Industries, we strive to provide the Highest Quality content in our Mods. Due to this, we cannot provide estimations of when a certain Armor will be added. Please be patient and know that whenever the Armor you're interested in is added, it'll be created in perfection. _We will also hold Votes on our Patreon where Supporters can Vote a single new Suit addition from a group of choices_

Will you add Iron Man Armors from X Universe?
- No, we will only be adding Iron Man Armors from the MCU and Armored Adventures TV Show. On Launch, only a select group of MCU Armors will be available. There will be a Post-Launch "Armored Adventures x The Mandarin" Update that will begin bringing Armored Adventures Content to the Mod.
- There will be no Comics Armors added to this Mod

Why the *bleep* don't the Makluan Rings Work!?
- The Makluan Rings (On Launch) have no functionality. The Makluan Temples and Makluan Rings were added so that the Official Server has them available in the World for when they will have a function. When will this be? In the Post-Launch "Armored Adventures x The Mandarin" Update. No, I cannot say when that will happen at this time as a character like The Mandarin will take a lot of time to code to get just right. The roadmap is laid out but it will take time.
- In the meantime, don't throw away those Rings! You'll need all 10 collected to be the most OP character in the game and unlock the "Wipe" Ability.

How do I craft Iron Man Armors?
- You must first Craft the Stark Computer. Please use JEI (or some other similar Mod) to view these Recipes. The Recipes for the actual Iron Man Armors can be viewed in the Stark Computer. Every Iron Man Armor needs a Stark Access Key that you can find in Stark Outpost Structures.

I equipped my Iron Man Armor but I can't move!
- Your Armor is likely powered off. It needs a Power Source. Craft and Equip the appropriate Arc Reactors.
  - Mark I to V need the Tier 1 Arc Reactor
  - Mark VI+ need the Tier 2 Arc Reactor
- You'll need an Arc Reactor Core (found in Mini Arc Reactor Structures). Tier 2 Arc Reactors will also need Synthetic Vibranium which needs Howard Stark's Blueprints to Craft (those can be found in Stark Outpost Structures)

Where do I get X Material!?
- Most materials needed for Crafting (that cannot be found in the wild like ores) will be found in structures like the Mini Arc Reactor and Stark Outpost.
</details>

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5777b5062d180ed22c4d17f9e2bd60f541865550.png)


## Commands and Iron Man Skill Points System

<details>
<summary>Click to View the List of Commands</summary>

/impoints check
- Shows the number of Skill Points you have for the exact Iron Man Armor you're wearing when running the command. It also shows the progress X/50 until your next Skill Point
- Skill Points are Per-Mark

/impointsadmin (player) (mark_x) (amount of skill points)
- Gives a player a specific amount of Skill Points for a specific Iron Man Armor
- For the (mark_x) argument, only put the number (so 3 instead of mark_3 for Mark 3)

/impointsadmin (player) *
- Gives a player 100 Skill Points for all Iron Man Armors

</details>

<details>
<summary>Click for Info Regarding the Skill Point System</summary>

50 Points of Progress will be needed to get one Skill Point for each armor separately. Progress is separate for each Armor and each Player. Progress is Obtained by killing Mobs while wearing a Specific Iron Man Armor

Mobs and the Progress Points they Provide:
- Base Mobs (zombies, skeletons, creepers, enderman, etc.) give 1-2/50 Progress
- Ender Dragon gives 50/50 Progress
- Warden gives 50/50 Progress
- Wither gives 20/50 Progress

Getting 50/50 Progress awards 1 Skill Point FOR THE IRONMAN ARMOR YOU KILLED THE MOB WITH. Progress will be separate for each Player and for each Ironman Mark they have.

</details>

\
